commit.message:
Refactor GitHub Pages: PR staging subfolders on docs-live branch (#3639)

Replace the dual-branch deployment model (gh-pages + staging branches)
with a single docs-live branch. Main deploys to root, PR previews
deploy to staging/{pr_number}/ subfolders, and a go-live workflow
publishes the branch to GitHub Pages.

- Rewrite build-site.yml: unified build job, deploy to docs-live branch
- Add build-site-cleanup.yml: removes staging dir on PR close
- Add build-site-go-live.yml: publishes docs-live via deploy-pages
- Add SPA routing for gallery deep links (404.html + index.html)
- Add build footer to docs and gallery (source, branch, commit)
- Remove serve-site.ps1/.sh (no longer needed)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: SkiaSharp
repository.description: SkiaSharp is a cross-platform 2D graphics API for .NET platforms based on Google's Skia Graphics Library. It provides a comprehensive 2D API that can be used across mobile, server and desktop models to render images.

Update DOCKER.md

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Implement Phases 2-9: types, security, constants, resources, hooks, error handling, docs, tests

Phase 2: Replace any types with JointStateData, Record<string, unknown>, typed subscribers
Phase 3: Remove dangerouslySetInnerHTML (JsonView), sanitize rosbag name/duration, validate topic names
Phase 4: Replace all magic numbers with named constants from constants.ts
Phase 5: Add publisher refs (cmdVelRef, armLeftCmdRef, etc.), timer refs, publisher init effect, cleanup on unmount
Phase 6: Extract useKeyboardControls hook, NotificationToast component, ConnectionPanel component
Phase 7: Wrap all ROS subscribe callbacks with try/catch and typed casts
Phase 8: Add JSDoc to App component
Phase 9: Add tests for useKeyboardControls, NotificationToast, ConnectionPanel

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: MatPomGit <33669232+MatPomGit@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix hardcoded zsp namespace in pyext_gen_pyx - use configured namespace

Previously UP.h include path was hardcoded to 'zsp/ast/impl/UP.h' with
namespace 'zsp::ast', ignoring the namespace passed at generation time.
Now uses CppGenNS.incpath() to derive the correct path from the configured
namespace (e.g. 'pssp::ast' -> 'pssp/ast/impl/UP.h').

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: ot-tag-registry
repository.description: [DEMO] Industrial sensor tags are usually a mess of confusing spreadsheets, causing mixed-up names and super slow setups. The OT Tag Registry fixes this by giving you one central hub to easily create, organize, and standardize all your tags, keeping everything totally consistent and way easier to manage everywhere.

commit.message:
fix(services): improve agent prompt for tag name generation

Use short codes instead of display names in tag name construction.
Add tool-failure fallback mappings for site/line resolution.
Always copy unit/datatype from search results unless the query
explicitly describes a different measurement.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

The OT Tag Registry fixes this by giving you one central hub to easily create, organize, and standardize all your tags, keeping everything totally consistent and way easier to manage everywhere.

commit.message:
fix(services): use account-level endpoint for embedding clients

Embeddings are deployed at the account scope, not the project scope.
Use AI_SERVICES_ENDPOINT (falling back to stripping PROJECT_ENDPOINT)
in both auto_fill.py and seed_index.py.

commit.message:
fix(server): separate account-level and project-level AI clients

Split _get_ai_client into _get_ai_client (account-level endpoint
for embeddings) and _get_agent_client (project-scoped for agent
calls). Fall back to stripping PROJECT_ENDPOINT when
AI_SERVICES_ENDPOINT is unset. Increase tool-call timeouts to 30s.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(infra): add retry logic for agent setup in postprovision

AI Foundry projects may take time to propagate after fresh creation.
Retry agent setup up to 3 times with 30s delays, and warn instead
of failing if all attempts are exhausted.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(infra): add AI_SERVICES_ENDPOINT output and storage blob role

Add account-level AI Services endpoint as a Bicep output so
downstream services can target embedding deployments correctly.
Grant Storage Blob Data Owner to the signed-in user for Function
App deployments. Enable public network access on the storage
account and expose its name as an output.

repository.description: [DEMO] Industrial sensor tags are usually a mess of confusing spreadsheets, causing mixed-up names and super slow setups. The OT Tag Registry fixes this by giving you one central hub to easily create, organize, and standardize all your tags, keeping everything totally consistent and way easier to manage everywhere.

commit.message:
feat(infra): add Flex Consumption Function App with managed identity

Replace Linux Consumption plan with Flex Consumption (FC1 SKU) for the
Function App. Uses managed identity for all storage operations — no
shared key access required.

- function-app.bicep: Flex Consumption with blob-based deployment,
  SystemAssignedIdentity auth, RBAC roles for blob/queue/table
- cosmos-role.bicep: new module for Cosmos DB data-plane role assignments
- azure.yaml: add functions service definition for azd deploy

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(infra): use correct project-scoped endpoint for AI Foundry

Bicep now outputs the full project-scoped endpoint using the
.services.ai.azure.com domain instead of .cognitiveservices.azure.com.
This fixes the 404 error when creating agents via AIProjectClient.

- ai-foundry.bicep: add projectEndpoint output with correct domain
- main.bicep: wire PROJECT_ENDPOINT to projectEndpoint, add PROJECT_NAME
- postprovision.sh: plumb PROJECT_NAME to .env files
- search.py: use PROJECT_ENDPOINT directly (no manual construction)
- setup_agent.py: same simplification
- .env.example files: add missing env vars

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add Nx Release workflow documentation page (#1486)

This pull request updates the documentation to clarify and expand the
release automation options for monorepos, specifically by distinguishing
between Changesets and Nx-based release workflows. It introduces a new,
comprehensive guide for automating versioning and publishing with Nx,
and updates existing docs to direct Nx users to the appropriate
resource.

Resolves: CES-1451
depends-on: #1510

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Refactor index creation in setup_db.py to data-driven loop

- Replace 42 individual cursor.execute() calls with an _INDEXES
  tuple-of-tuples and a compact loop.
- Add PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON after connecting.

commit.message:
refactor: extract _get helper to eliminate GET request duplication in api_service.py

Replaced ~880 lines of duplicated try/except/requests.get boilerplate
across 34 GET functions with a single _get() helper. Each public function
is now a thin 2-line wrapper that delegates to _get(), preserving the
same name, signature, decorator, and return type.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: pbmconsulting-hub <266123236+pbmconsulting-hub@users.noreply.github.com>

Refactor 29 API endpoints to use _query_rows/_query_one helpers

Replace repetitive conn = _get_conn(); try/except/finally patterns
with calls to the new _query_rows() and _query_one() helper functions.
All SQL queries, parameters, and response shapes remain identical.

Endpoints NOT changed (custom logic): get_player_last5, get_games_today,
refresh_data, get_team_roster, get_team_stats, search_players.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: pbmconsulting-hub <266123236+pbmconsulting-hub@users.noreply.github.com>

Replace hardcoded time.sleep(2) with _rate_limited_sleep() and make fetch_and_load_rosters concurrent

- Replace all 13 remaining time.sleep(2) calls with the thread-safe
  _rate_limited_sleep() helper that already exists in the module.
- Refactor fetch_and_load_rosters() to use ThreadPoolExecutor with
  _PLAYER_WORKERS (3) threads instead of sequential iteration, matching
  the pattern used by career stats and shot chart functions.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: Azure Skills documentation generation pipeline (#365) (#367)

* .squad: Consolidation review orchestration complete

Merged 8 team member reviews of .NET project consolidation plan (42->40 projects, 6 actions approved, 1 deferred).

Changes:
- AD-027 through AD-034: Consolidation decisions, quality gates, safeguards
- Updated all 8 agent history files with consolidation review summaries
- Merged inbox decisions into decisions.md (inbox now empty)
- Created session log: .squad/log/2026-03-30T00-45-consolidation-review.md

Verdicts (all APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS except Quinn/Reeve who were fully approved):
- Riley: APPROVE WITH CHANGES - Action 7 rejected (subprocess isolation violation)
- Morgan: APPROVE WITH CHANGES - 7-hour estimate; behavioral caveat on Action 5
- Cameron: APPROVE WITH CHANGES - 3 quality gates required
- Quinn: APPROVED - No CI/CD changes needed
- Parker: APPROVE WITH CONTINGENCIES - 9 acceptance criteria
- Sage: RECOMMEND APPROVAL - 3 safeguards for Actions 2-4
- Reeve: APPROVED - 3 tech docs need targeted updates

Execution: 6-8 hours across 2 sprints (Phase 1-3). Quality gates mandatory per AD-028.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: Azure Skills documentation generation pipeline (#365)

Independent .NET pipeline in skills-generation/ that generates
customer-facing documentation for 24 Azure Skills in GitHub Copilot.

Architecture:
- skills-generation.slnx with SkillsGen.Core + SkillsGen.Cli + Tests
- 8-module pipeline: fetcher → skill-parser → trigger-parser →
  tier-assessor → template-filler + llm-rewriter → validator → orchestrator
- Hybrid generation: deterministic sections from parsed data,
  LLM-enhanced narrative with --no-llm fallback
- Handlebars template with structured prerequisites (RBAC, tools, resources)
- Acrolinx post-processor (static replacements, acronyms, contractions)
- Detailed per-skill + batch logging
- Generation manifest (JSON) for traceability

Key features:
- Tier assessment: 5-question deterministic decision tree (Tier 1/Tier 2)
- Skill identifier with links to source + triggers on GitHub
- 24 skills across 7 categories in skills-inventory.json
- start-azure-skills.sh entry point (independent from MCP pipeline)

Test coverage:
- 77 tests, 0 failures
- 81.6% line coverage, 73% branch coverage
- TDD per AD-007/AD-010

MCP pipeline: zero changes, zero regressions

Closes #365

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: Address code review findings from Copilot review

- Fix AzureOpenAiRewriter: bounds check on response.Content[0]
- Fix AzureOpenAiRewriter: remove duplicate systemPromptKnowledge assignment
- Fix AcrolinxPostProcessor: apply acronym expansions in reverse index order
- Fix GitHubSkillFetcher: add optional PAT token for authentication
- Fix LocalSkillFetcher: wrap file I/O in try-catch with helpful error messages

All 77 tests pass.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: Address all squad review findings (3 blocking + 7 recommended)

Blocking fixes:
- Add exponential backoff retry to AzureOpenAiRewriter (5 retries, 1s-16s)
- Add skills-generation-ci.yml GitHub Actions workflow
- Add skills-generation/README.md + CHANGELOG.md entry

Recommended fixes:
- Fix Q5 tier assessor: check specific Azure service keywords, not always-true
- Add anti-hallucination rules to LLM system prompt
- Add empty response test for AzureOpenAiRewriter
- Log warnings on missing/invalid config files in AcrolinxPostProcessor
- Verify HttpClient not disposed in GitHubSkillFetcher (correct)
- Remove duplicate PREREQ_EXISTS validation gate
- Fix stopwatch bug in batch error path

Tests: 81 passed (+4 new), 0 failed
Line coverage: 81.1% | Branch: 72.1%

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: Clean parser output - decode entities, extract WHEN items, cap prompts

- Decode HTML entities and YAML escapes before extracting list items
- Extract WHEN: items into UseFor list for 'When to use' section
- Extract DO NOT USE WHEN: items into DoNotUseFor list
- Stop-pattern prevents DON'T USE items from leaking into WHEN list
- CleanListItem strips quotes, entities, ALL-CAPS internal markers
- Fall back to trigger prompts when UseFor is empty
- Cap example prompts at 10 maximum
- Use whatItProvides for 'What it provides' section with fallback
- Title consistency: metadata title = H1 = TOC entry (displayName)

106 tests pass, 23/24 skills generate cleanly.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: NLP naturalization for UseFor/DoNotUseFor bullet points

Add NaturalizeItems() to SkillPageGenerator that converts raw keyword
fragments from SKILL.md into natural-language bullet points:

- Short noun phrases (< 5 words) get 'Work with' prefix
- Groups of 3-4 related short items merged: 'Work with X, Y, and Z'
- Verb-led items (create, deploy, configure, etc.) kept as-is
- Gerund forms recognized (creating, deploying, configuring)
- 5+ word phrases kept unchanged (already natural)
- Deduplication (case-insensitive)

Example: 'AI Search, query search, vector search, hybrid search'
  → 'Work with AI Search'
  → 'Query search'
  → 'Work with vector search, hybrid search, semantic search, and speech-to-text'

106 tests pass.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: Address all 7 architectural review issues

HIGH:
1. Post-processor: reorder to WrapSkillNames→replacements→contractions→
   acronyms→URLs. Protect backticked content with placeholder extraction.
2. Parser: try-catch on all regex operations, return empty on parse failure.

MEDIUM:
3. Template: move '## When to use' heading inside {{#if hasUseFor}} block
   to prevent orphaned headings.
4. NLP: min length check, verb-form detection (-ing/-ed/-tion), 2-item
   comma fix ('X and Y' not 'X, and Y').
5. GitHub fetcher: retry with exponential backoff (3x, 1s/2s/4s) on
   429/403 rate limits. 100ms inter-skill delay in batch mode.
6. CLI: fail-fast on missing inventory/template files. Warn on optional
   Acrolinx/prompt files at startup.
7. Tier assessor: externalize threshold to constructor param (default 4).
   Expand Q5 Azure service keywords (+16 services).

106 tests pass, 0 failures.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: Rename azure-cost-optimization to azure-cost (matches upstream repo)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: ms.date format M/d/yyyy + fix Related content URLs

- ms.date: 2026-04-02 → 4/2/2026 (Learn requires M/D/YYYY)
- Related content links: /azure/copilot/ → /azure/developer/ (valid paths)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: Derive display names from slugs, clean ALL-CAPS, add --tests-path

- DeriveDisplayName: azure-deploy → Azure Deploy (with acronym handling)
- Inventory displayName overrides parser-derived name in batch mode
- CleanDescription downcases ALL-CAPS words (except known acronyms)
- LocalSkillFetcher: add --tests-path for separate tests directory
- Fix orphaned period in descriptions

106 tests pass, 24/24 skills generate.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: Review-2 fixes — lowercase ALL-CAPS, dedup acronyms, +19 tests

Code fixes:
- ALL-CAPS downcasing: Title Case → lowercase ('already-prepared' not 'Already-prepared')
- Remove conflicting orphaned-period regex (was adding space before .azure/)
- Dedup acronym expansions: 'Service (Service (AKS))' → 'Service (AKS)'

New tests (+19, total 125):
- 6 NaturalizeItems tests (empty, verb-led, short keywords, 2-item, long, single)
- 7 DeriveDisplayName theory cases + 3 CleanDescription behavioral tests
- 3 dual-path LocalSkillFetcher tests (testsPath, fallback, null)

24/24 skills regenerated cleanly.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: Expand acronym preservation list (AWS, GCP, KQL, ADX, MSAL, +20 more)

Three sites had incomplete acronym lists causing aws/gcp/kql/msal to
appear lowercase in output. Unified all three to comprehensive set:
- CleanDescription keepUpper (parser)
- CleanListItem keepUpperInItems (parser)
- DeriveDisplayName acronyms (parser)

125 tests pass, 24/24 skills generate.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix Acrolinx issues: acronym casing, HTML entities, single-word bullets, shouldNotTrigger fallback

- Issue 1: Add FixAcronymCasing method to correct mis-cased acronyms (Ai→AI, Sdk→SDK, etc.) in naturalized bullet points
- Issue 2: Double-decode HTML entities in parser to handle double-encoded &quot; sequences
- Issue 3: Filter single-word verb/keyword items in NaturalizeItems (e.g., Recommend, Connect, Simulation)
- Issue 4: Stop using shouldNotTrigger test prompts as DoNotUseFor content — only use explicit SKILL.md items

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: Expand short bullets, fix acronyms, smart prereqs, rename Example triggers

- Short verb phrases (2-3 words) get ' in Azure' suffix for context
- FixAcronymCasing: Ai→AI, Aws→AWS, Gcp→GCP, etc. in naturalized items
- Remove 'When NOT to use' section (useless test data)

Pipeline integration:

commit.message:
fix(deploy): make nginx listen on Railway's dynamic PORT via envsubst

Railway injects PORT env var — nginx must listen on it instead of hardcoded 80.
Use envsubst to replace \ in nginx template at container startup.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

chore(deploy): add Railway config, fix nginx proxy and wsUrl for Railway
